structural_claim: Symmetry breaking spontaneously generates ordered structures from symmetric initial conditions, creating discrete patterns from continuous systems

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Symmetric laws produce asymmetric ground states, with gauge bosons acquiring mass through interaction with a field whose vacuum expectation value breaks the symmetry
Symmetric rotating flow spontaneously breaks into discrete vortex patterns through instability
Uniform thermal gradient spontaneously breaks into discrete convection cells when critical threshold is exceeded
